ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPRisk = true, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Filing', INCLUDES(ProjectShareclasses__r.CountryRegNeeded__c, 'United Kingdom'), ISBLANK(TEXT(SRRI__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Country Reg Needed contains "UnitedKingdom", please provide a value for SRRI.
